masters.name: Noir Precision
masters.description: High-contrast chiaroscuro with clinical digital precision. Inspired by David Fincher and classic Neo-Noir.

dna.lighting: Low-key, side-lit, dramatic chiaroscuro, cold color temperature (teal/cyan) with orange accents.
dna.camera: Locked-off shots, slow controlled pans, anamorphic 2.35:1, sharp focus, low grain.
dna.composition: Centered or strictly Rule of Thirds, negative space, geometric framing.
dna.prompt_logic: Masterpiece, cinematic still, 8k, highly detailed, Arri Alexa 65, anamorphic lens, neo-noir aesthetic, high contrast, clinical precision.

masters.name: Golden Ethereal
masters.description: Soft, naturalistic lighting with organic textures. Inspired by Terrence Malick and poetic realism.

dna.lighting: Golden hour, natural backlighting, soft diffused sun, warm hazy glows.
dna.camera: Handheld feeling, low angle, wide lens (14mm-24mm), shallow depth of field, subtle lens flares.
dna.prompt_logic: Poetic realism, golden hour lighting, lens flare, wide angle lens, organic textures, hyper-detailed, soft atmosphere, naturalistic cinematography.

masters.name: Neon Utilitarian
masters.description: Industrial cyberpunk with volumetric lighting. Inspired by Denis Villeneuve's Blade Runner 2049.

dna.lighting: Volumetric fog, neon glow, brutalist shadows, monochromatic color blocks (Total Orange / Deep Blue).
dna.camera: Scale-focused, massive wide shots, slow zoom, atmospheric perspective.
dna.prompt_logic: Cyberpunk, industrial, volumetric lighting, brutalist architecture, massive scale, moody atmosphere, heavy fog, monochromatic grading.

masters.name: Editorial Symmetric
masters.description: Flat, symmetric, and highly curated pastel palettes. Inspired by Wes Anderson.

dna.lighting: High-key, flat lighting, soft shadows, vibrant but pastel.
dna.camera: Perfectly centered, 90-degree whip-pans, planimetric composition, toy-like scale.
dna.composition: Centered symmetry, diorama style, flat planes, obsessive detail.
dna.prompt_logic: Symmetric composition, planimetric, pastel colors, whimsical, editorial design, diorama style, highly curated, flat lighting.
